calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property To Estate
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Dito for Jenaer International. M. Kinglsey Brown for Chin Wo Yu (Petitioner).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
